metadata.description: Malaysia school mathematics curriculum knowledge graph — Year 1 through STPM, with prerequisite ordering
metadata.notes: Mathematics M (950) is not yet covered in this graph. Only Mathematics T (954) is included.

nodes.label: Malaysia Mathematics
nodes.description: Complete Malaysian mathematics curriculum from Year 1 through pre-university (STPM)

nodes.label: Primary Mathematics (KSSR)
nodes.description: Year 1–6 primary school mathematics under KSSR Semakan curriculum

nodes.label: Secondary Mathematics (KSSM)
nodes.description: Form 1–5 secondary school mathematics under KSSM curriculum

nodes.label: Additional Mathematics (KSSM)
nodes.description: Form 4–5 Additional Mathematics — advanced elective stream

nodes.label: STPM Mathematics
nodes.description: Pre-university STPM Mathematics (T) and (M) — Semesters 1–3

nodes.label: Numbers Up to 100
nodes.description: Recognise, read, write and count numbers from 0 to 100

nodes.label: Counting
nodes.description: Counting objects and determining 'many' and 'few'

nodes.label: Recognise 0 to 10
nodes.description: Identify and name numbers from zero to ten

nodes.label: Write 0 to 10
nodes.description: Write numerals and number words for 0 to 10

nodes.label: Recognise 11 to 20
nodes.description: Identify and name numbers from 11 to 20

nodes.label: Recognise 21 to 100
nodes.description: Identify and name numbers from 21 to 100

nodes.label: Place Value and Digit Value (Y1)
nodes.description: Recognise place value (ones, tens) and digit value for numbers up to 100

nodes.label: Number Ordering (Y1)
nodes.description: Compare numbers using more/less and arrange numbers in order

nodes.label: Number Patterns (Y1)
nodes.description: Recognise and continue simple number patterns

nodes.label: Addition (Y1)
nodes.description: Add numbers with sums up to 100, including quick addition strategies

nodes.label: Subtraction (Y1)
nodes.description: Subtract numbers within 100

nodes.label: Repeated Addition
nodes.description: Add the same number multiple times — foundation for multiplication

nodes.label: Repeated Subtraction
nodes.description: Subtract the same number multiple times — foundation for division

nodes.label: Money (Y1)
nodes.description: Recognise Malaysian coins and notes, value and conversion of money

nodes.label: Time (Y1)
nodes.description: Recognise time of day, read clocks, days, weeks and months

nodes.label: Length, Mass and Volume (Y1)
nodes.description: Recognise, measure and compare length, mass, and volume of liquids using non-standard units

nodes.label: 3D Shapes (Y1)
nodes.description: Recognise basic 3D shapes, shape patterns, build models

nodes.label: 2D Shapes (Y1)
nodes.description: Recognise basic 2D shapes, shape patterns, create patterns

nodes.label: Data and Pictographs (Y1)
nodes.description: Collect data and read simple pictographs

nodes.label: Numbers Up to 1 000
nodes.description: Recognise, write, compare, arrange, estimate and round off numbers up to 1 000

nodes.label: Place Value (Y2)
nodes.description: Place value and digit value for numbers up to 1 000 (ones, tens, hundreds)

nodes.label: Partition Numbers (Y2)
nodes.description: Break numbers into expanded form by place value

nodes.label: Number Patterns (Y2)
nodes.description: Recognise and continue number patterns up to 1 000

nodes.label: Addition (Y2)
nodes.description: Add two and three numbers with sums up to 1 000

nodes.label: Subtraction (Y2)
nodes.description: Subtract numbers within 1 000, including successive subtraction

nodes.label: Multiplication (Y2)
nodes.description: Build up times tables (2, 3, 4, 5, 10), basic multiplication facts

nodes.label: Division (Y2)
nodes.description: Build up division facts related to times tables (2, 3, 4, 5, 10)

nodes.label: Fractions (Y2)
nodes.description: Recognise, write, and compare fractions

nodes.label: Money (Y2)
nodes.description: Addition, subtraction, multiplication and division of money

nodes.label: Time (Y2)
nodes.description: Read minutes, say and write time, relationships in time

nodes.label: Length, Mass and Volume (Y2)
nodes.description: Standard units (cm, m, g, kg, ml, L), measure and estimate

nodes.label: 3D and 2D Shapes (Y2)
nodes.description: Identify 3D shapes and nets, identify and draw 2D shapes

nodes.label: Bar Charts (Y2)
nodes.description: Collect data and read bar charts

nodes.label: Numbers Up to 10 000
nodes.description: Recognise, compare, arrange, estimate, round off numbers up to 10 000

nodes.label: Addition and Subtraction (Y3)
nodes.description: Add and subtract within 10 000 including three-number addition and successive subtraction

nodes.label: Multiplication (Y3)
nodes.description: Multiply numbers within 10 000

nodes.label: Division (Y3)
nodes.description: Divide numbers within 10 000

nodes.label: Unknown in Equations (Y3)
nodes.description: Recognise and find unknown values in number sentences

nodes.label: Proper Fractions
nodes.description: Recognise and work with proper fractions

nodes.label: Equivalent Fractions
nodes.description: Identify equivalent fractions and simplify to simplest form

nodes.label: Addition and Subtraction of Fractions (Y3)
nodes.description: Add and subtract fractions with same and different denominators

nodes.label: Money (Y3)
nodes.description: Four operations with money, recognise foreign currencies, money literacy

nodes.label: Time (Y3)
nodes.description: Calendar, time relationships, four operations with time

nodes.label: Length, Mass and Volume (Y3)
nodes.description: Convert units, four operations with length, mass, and volume of liquid

nodes.label: Prisms and Non-Prisms
nodes.description: Recognise prisms and non-prisms, regular polygons

nodes.label: Axis of Symmetry
nodes.description: Identify lines of symmetry in 2D shapes

nodes.label: Numbers Up to 100 000
nodes.description: Place value, digit value, partition, estimate, round off, number patterns up to 100 000

nodes.label: Addition (Y4)
nodes.description: Addition within 100 000, unknown in addition

nodes.label: Subtraction (Y4)
nodes.description: Subtraction within 100 000, consecutive subtraction, unknown in subtraction

nodes.label: Multiplication (Y4)
nodes.description: Multiply within 100 000

nodes.label: Division (Y4)
nodes.description: Divide within 100 000

nodes.label: Mixed Operations (Y4)
nodes.description: Combined addition/subtraction and multiplication/division

nodes.label: Improper Fractions and Mixed Numbers (Y4)
nodes.description: Relationship and conversion between improper fractions and mixed numbers

nodes.label: Addition and Subtraction of Fractions (Y4)
nodes.description: Add and subtract fractions including mixed numbers

nodes.label: Decimals (Y4)
nodes.description: Recognise decimals, relate to fractions, compare, four operations with decimals

nodes.label: Money (Y4)
nodes.description: Four operations with money, rounding, foreign currency, payment instruments

nodes.label: Time (Y4)
nodes.description: Relationships in time (day/hour, week/day, year/month), four operations with time

nodes.label: Length (Y4)
nodes.description: Units of length (mm, cm, m, km), conversions, four operations

nodes.label: Mass (Y4)
nodes.description: Four operations with mass (g, kg)

nodes.label: Volume of Liquid (Y4)
nodes.description: Four operations with volume of liquid (ml, L)

nodes.label: Angles (Y4)
nodes.description: Recognise angles

nodes.label: Parallel and Perpendicular Lines (Y4)
nodes.description: Recognise parallel lines and perpendicular lines

nodes.label: Perimeter (Y4)
nodes.description: Calculate perimeter of shapes

nodes.label: Area (Y4)
nodes.description: Calculate area of rectangles and squares

nodes.label: Coordinates (Y4)
nodes.description: Recognise and determine position on a coordinate grid

nodes.label: Data Handling (Y4)
nodes.description: Compare information using pictographs, bar charts, and pie charts

nodes.label: Whole Numbers and Operations (Y5)
nodes.description: Numbers up to millions, prime numbers, all four operations and mixed operations

nodes.label: Prime Numbers (Y5)
nodes.description: Identify prime numbers

nodes.label: Mixed Operations (Y5)
nodes.description: Combinations of operations: add/multiply, subtract/divide, etc.

nodes.label: Multiplication of Fractions (Y5)
nodes.description: Multiply fractions by whole numbers and fractions

nodes.label: Rounding Off Decimals (Y5)
nodes.description: Round decimals to specified decimal places

nodes.label: Four Operations with Decimals (Y5)
nodes.description: Add, subtract, multiply and divide decimals

nodes.label: Percentages (Y5)
nodes.description: Convert mixed numbers and percentages, find quantity and percentage

nodes.label: Money (Y5)
nodes.description: Four operations and mixed operations with money, financial literacy including interest and credit

nodes.label: Time (Y5)
nodes.description: Duration, unit conversion (decades, centuries), four operations with time

nodes.label: Length, Mass and Volume (Y5)
nodes.description: Convert units, four operations with all measurement types

nodes.label: Regular Polygons (Y5)
nodes.description: Recognise regular polygons and measure interior angles

nodes.label: Perimeter of Composite Shapes (Y5)
nodes.description: Calculate perimeter of composite 2D shapes

nodes.label: Area of Composite Shapes (Y5)
nodes.description: Calculate area of composite 2D shapes

nodes.label: Distance Between Coordinates (Y5)
nodes.description: Find horizontal and vertical distance between two coordinates

nodes.label: Ratio (Y5)
nodes.description: Ratio between two quantities

nodes.label: Proportion (Y5)
nodes.description: Use proportion to find unknown values

nodes.label: Whole Numbers and Operations (Y6)
nodes.description: Fractions/decimals of millions, all operations, mixed operations with unknowns, prime and composite numbers

nodes.label: Prime and Composite Numbers (Y6)
nodes.description: Distinguish prime numbers from composite numbers

nodes.label: Division of Fractions (Y5)
nodes.description: Divide proper fractions and mixed numbers by whole numbers and fractions

nodes.label: Mixed Operations with Decimals (Y6)
nodes.description: All combined operations with decimals

nodes.label: Percentages (Y6)
nodes.description: Convert decimals to percentages, add/subtract percentages, find quantity and percentage value

nodes.label: Profit and Loss
nodes.description: Cost price, selling price, profit and loss

nodes.label: Discount, Rebate and Voucher
nodes.description: Calculate discounts, understand rebates and vouchers

nodes.label: Invoice, Bill, Receipt and Tax
nodes.description: Read invoices, bills, receipts; understand service tax

nodes.label: Time Zones
nodes.description: Recognise time zones around the world

nodes.label: Measurement (Y6)
nodes.description: Combined problems involving length, mass, and volume of liquid

nodes.label: Interior Angles of Regular Polygons (Y6)
nodes.description: Draw, measure and calculate interior angles of regular polygons

nodes.label: Circles (Y6)
nodes.description: Centre, diameter, radius; draw circles

nodes.label: Coordinates and Ratio (Y6)
nodes.description: Distance between coordinates, ratio, proportion

nodes.label: Likelihood
nodes.description: Certain, impossible, equally likely, more/less likely events

nodes.label: Integers
nodes.description: Positive and negative integers, basic arithmetic operations with integers

nodes.label: Rational Numbers
nodes.description: Positive/negative fractions and decimals as rational numbers

nodes.label: Factors, Prime Factors and HCF
nodes.description: Factors, prime factorisation, highest common factor

nodes.label: Multiples and LCM
nodes.description: Common multiples and lowest common multiple

nodes.label: Squares and Square Roots
nodes.description: Perfect squares, square roots of whole numbers and fractions

nodes.label: Cubes and Cube Roots
nodes.description: Perfect cubes and cube roots

nodes.label: Ratios (F1)
nodes.description: Ratios between quantities, equivalent ratios

nodes.label: Rates (F1)
nodes.description: Rates and unit rates

nodes.label: Proportions (F1)
nodes.description: Direct proportion, relationship with percentages, fractions and decimals

nodes.label: Algebraic Expressions
nodes.description: Variables, algebraic expressions, basic arithmetic operations on expressions

nodes.label: Linear Equations in One Variable
nodes.description: Solve linear equations in one variable

nodes.label: Linear Equations in Two Variables
nodes.description: Form and solve linear equations in two variables

nodes.label: Simultaneous Linear Equations
nodes.description: Solve simultaneous linear equations in two variables

nodes.label: Linear Inequalities in One Variable
nodes.description: Inequalities and solving linear inequalities in one variable

nodes.label: Lines and Angles
nodes.description: Lines, angles, angles at intersecting lines, parallel lines and transversals

nodes.label: Basic Polygons
nodes.description: Properties of triangles and quadrilaterals, interior and exterior angles

nodes.label: Perimeter and Area (F1)
nodes.description: Perimeter and area of triangles, parallelograms, kites and trapeziums

nodes.label: Data Handling (F1)
nodes.description: Data collection, organisation, representation and interpretation

nodes.label: Pythagoras' Theorem
nodes.description: The Pythagorean theorem and its converse for right-angled triangles

nodes.label: Patterns and Sequences
nodes.description: Recognise patterns, sequences, and predict terms

nodes.label: Expansion
nodes.description: Expand algebraic expressions

nodes.label: Factorisation
nodes.description: Factorise algebraic expressions

nodes.label: Algebraic Formulae
nodes.description: Form and use algebraic formulae, change subject of formula

nodes.label: Interior and Exterior Angles of Polygons
nodes.description: Calculate interior and exterior angles of regular polygons

nodes.label: Properties of Circles
nodes.description: Symmetry, chords, circumference and area of circles

nodes.label: Three-Dimensional Shapes (F2)
nodes.description: Geometric properties, nets, surface area and volume of 3D shapes

nodes.label: Cartesian Coordinates
nodes.description: Distance and midpoint in the Cartesian coordinate system

nodes.label: Functions and Graphs (F3)
nodes.description: Functions and graphs of functions

nodes.label: Speed and Acceleration
nodes.description: Speed and acceleration concepts

nodes.label: Gradient of a Straight Line
nodes.description: Calculate and interpret gradient

nodes.label: Isometric Transformations
nodes.description: Translation, reflection, rotation as isometries; rotational symmetry

nodes.label: Measures of Central Tendency
nodes.description: Mean, median, mode for ungrouped data

nodes.label: Simple Probability
nodes.description: Experimental probability, theoretical probability, complement of events

nodes.label: Indices
nodes.description: Index notation and laws of indices

nodes.label: Standard Form
nodes.description: Significant figures and standard form (scientific notation)

nodes.label: Consumer Mathematics (F3)
nodes.description: Savings, investments, credit and debt management

nodes.label: Scale Drawings
nodes.description: Interpret and create scale drawings

nodes.label: Trigonometric Ratios
nodes.description: Sine, cosine and tangent of acute angles in right-angled triangles

nodes.label: Angles and Tangents of Circles
nodes.description: Central angle, angle at circumference, cyclic quadrilaterals, tangents to circles

nodes.label: Plans and Elevations
nodes.description: Orthogonal projections, plans and elevations of 3D objects

nodes.label: Loci in Two Dimensions
nodes.description: Understand and construct loci in 2D

nodes.label: Straight Lines
nodes.description: Equation of straight lines, gradient-intercept form

nodes.label: Quadratic Functions and Equations
nodes.description: Quadratic functions and equations in one variable

nodes.label: Operations on Sets
nodes.description: Intersection, union, and combined operations on sets

nodes.label: Network in Graph Theory
nodes.description: Vertices, edges, degree, Euler paths in networks

nodes.label: Linear Inequalities in Two Variables
nodes.description: Linear inequalities and systems of linear inequalities in two variables

nodes.label: Graphs of Motion
nodes.description: Distance-time and speed-time graphs

nodes.label: Measures of Dispersion (Ungrouped)
nodes.description: Range, interquartile range, variance, standard deviation for ungrouped data

nodes.label: Probability of Combined Events
nodes.description: Combined events, dependent/independent events, mutually exclusive events

nodes.label: Financial Planning and Management
nodes.description: Personal financial planning and management

nodes.label: Variation
nodes.description: Direct variation, inverse variation, combined variation

nodes.label: Matrices
nodes.description: Matrix operations: addition, subtraction, scalar multiplication, matrix multiplication

nodes.label: Consumer Mathematics: Insurance
nodes.description: Risk assessment and insurance coverage

nodes.label: Consumer Mathematics: Taxation
nodes.description: Income tax and other forms of taxation

nodes.label: Congruency and Enlargement
nodes.description: Congruency, enlargement, combined transformations, tessellation

nodes.label: Trigonometric Functions (F5)
nodes.description: Sine, cosine, tangent for 0°–360°; graphs of trig functions

nodes.label: Measures of Dispersion (Grouped)
nodes.description: Dispersion and measures of dispersion for grouped data

nodes.label: Mathematical Modeling
nodes.description: Build and interpret mathematical models

nodes.label: Functions (Add Math)
nodes.description: Functions, composite functions, inverse functions

nodes.label: Quadratic Functions (Add Math)
nodes.description: Quadratic equations, discriminant, types of roots, quadratic inequalities

nodes.label: Systems of Equations (Add Math)
nodes.description: Systems of 3 linear equations; simultaneous linear and non-linear equations

nodes.label: Indices, Surds and Logarithms
nodes.description: Laws of indices, surds, logarithms and their applications

nodes.label: Arithmetic and Geometric Progressions
nodes.description: Arithmetic progressions (AP) and geometric progressions (GP), nth term and sum

nodes.label: Linear Law
nodes.description: Linear and non-linear relations, applying linear law

nodes.label: Coordinate Geometry (Add Math)
nodes.description: Divisor of line segment, parallel/perpendicular lines, area of polygons, equations of loci

nodes.label: Vectors
nodes.description: Vectors, vector addition/subtraction, vectors in Cartesian plane

nodes.label: Solution of Triangles
nodes.description: Sine rule, cosine rule, area of triangle

nodes.label: Index Numbers (Add Math F5)
nodes.description: Index numbers and composite index

nodes.label: Circular Measure
nodes.description: Radians, arc length, area of sector

nodes.label: Differentiation (Add Math)
nodes.description: Limits, first and second derivatives, applications of differentiation

nodes.label: Integration (Add Math)
nodes.description: Indefinite and definite integrals, applications of integration

nodes.label: Permutation and Combination
nodes.description: Counting principles: permutations and combinations

nodes.label: Probability Distribution (Add Math)
nodes.description: Random variables, binomial distribution, normal distribution

nodes.label: Trigonometric Functions (Add Math)
nodes.description: Trig ratios for all angles, graphs, identities, addition and double angle formulae

nodes.label: Linear Programming
nodes.description: Linear programming models and applications

nodes.label: Kinematics of Linear Motion
nodes.description: Displacement, velocity, acceleration as functions of time; differentiation and integration in kinematics

nodes.label: Functions (STPM)
nodes.description: Polynomial, rational, exponential, logarithmic, and trigonometric functions

nodes.label: Sequences and Series (STPM)
nodes.description: Sequences, series, and binomial expansions

nodes.label: Matrices (STPM)
nodes.description: Matrices and systems of linear equations

nodes.label: Limits and Continuity
nodes.description: Limits of functions and continuity

nodes.label: Differentiation (STPM)
nodes.description: Derivatives and applications of differentiation

nodes.label: Integration (STPM)
nodes.description: Indefinite and definite integrals

nodes.label: Differential Equations
nodes.description: First order differential equations, separable variables, linear DEs

nodes.label: Maclaurin Series
nodes.description: Maclaurin series expansions and applications

nodes.label: Numerical Methods
nodes.description: Numerical solutions of equations and numerical integration

nodes.label: Data Description (STPM)
nodes.description: Data representation, central tendency, dispersion, distribution shape

nodes.label: Probability (STPM)
nodes.description: Counting techniques and probability theory

nodes.label: Probability Distributions (STPM)
nodes.description: Discrete/continuous random variables, binomial, Poisson, normal distributions

nodes.label: Sampling and Estimation
nodes.description: Sampling methods and estimation of population parameters

nodes.label: Hypothesis Testing
nodes.description: Testing population mean and proportion

nodes.label: Chi-Squared Tests
nodes.description: Goodness-of-fit tests and tests of independence

nodes.label: Rounding Off (Y2)
nodes.description: Round off numbers to the nearest ten and hundred

nodes.label: Fractions Introduction (Y2)
nodes.description: Recognise halves, quarters — parts of a whole

nodes.label: Location (Y4)
nodes.description: Recognise and determine location on simple maps and grids

nodes.label: Volume of 3D Shapes (Y5)
nodes.description: Calculate volume of cubes and cuboids

nodes.label: Estimation and Rounding (Y4)
nodes.description: Estimate and round off numbers up to 100 000

nodes.label: Number Patterns (Y4)
nodes.description: Recognise and extend number patterns up to 100 000

nodes.label: Pie Charts (Y4)
nodes.description: Recognise and interpret pie charts

nodes.label: Volume of Composite Shapes (Y6)
nodes.description: Calculate volume of composite 3D shapes

nodes.label: Addition/Subtraction of Fractions with Mixed Numbers (Y5)
nodes.description: Add and subtract fractions including mixed numbers

nodes.label: Speed, Distance and Time
nodes.description: Understand relationship between speed, distance and time; solve problems

nodes.label: Data Handling and Statistics (Y6)
nodes.description: Collect, organise and interpret data; calculate mean

nodes.label: Introduction to Sets (F4)
nodes.description: Sets, Venn diagrams, universal sets, complement, subsets

nodes.label: Complex Numbers
nodes.description: Complex number system, operations, Argand diagram, De Moivre's theorem

nodes.label: Analytic Geometry / Conic Sections
nodes.description: Equations and properties of circles, ellipses, parabolas and hyperbolas

nodes.label: Correlation and Regression
nodes.description: Scatter diagrams, Pearson correlation coefficient, linear regression

edges.description: Primary mathematics is prerequisite for secondary
Core secondary math required before Additional Mathematics
Additional Mathematics is prerequisite for STPM Mathematics
